dialogue_text: I presume that should you accidentally wound an enemy you would take him home and nurse him back to health,
source_excerpt: "I presume that should you accidentally wound an enemy you would take him home and nurse him back to health," she laughed.

speaker.notes: Context suggests a female speaker, but the source wording is still ambiguous.

dialogue_text: That is precisely what we do on Earth,
source_excerpt: "That is precisely what we do on Earth," I answered. "At least among civilized men."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
